quick_skim.title: scLLM-DSC: LLM-Knowledge Enhanced Cross-Modal Deep Structural Clustering for Single-Cell RNA Sequencing
quick_skim.abstract: Clustering is fundamental to scRNA-seq analysis, serving as a cornerstone for identifying cell populations and resolving tissue heterogeneity. However, existing methods focus on mining numerical statistical patterns, suffering from semantic agnosticism by neglecting the intrinsic biological functions encoded by genes. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer promising semantic capabilities, their direct adaptation to cell clustering is hindered by the structural mismatch between generative pre-training objectives and discriminative downstream tasks. To bridge this gap, we propose scLLM-DSC, a novel LLM-Knowledge Enhanced Cross-Modal Deep Structural Clustering framework. Diverging from data-driven paradigms, scLLM-DSC establishes a semantically-grounded representation by synergizing two views: a Knowledge-Driven Semantic View derived from NCBI gene priors and contextualized Cell2Sentence embeddings, and a Structure-Aware Topological View extracted via a graph-guided encoder. Crucially, we introduce a cross-modal contrastive alignment mechanism to enforce consistency between biological semantics and transcriptomic features within a unified latent space. Extensive benchmarks demonstrate that scLLM-DSC significantly outperforms eleven state-of-the-art baselines in clustering accuracy.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: clustering using large language models with cross-modal deep structural clustering
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 利用大语言模型进行聚类，采用跨模态深度结构聚类
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 利用大语言模型进行聚类，采用跨模态深度结构聚类
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 利用大语言模型进行聚类，采用跨模态深度结构聚类
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes scLLM-DSC, a framework that integrates LLM semantic knowledge into deep structural clustering for scRNA-seq, overcoming semantic agnosticism by aligning gene functions and achieving superior clustering performance.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 单细胞RNA测序分析中聚类是关键，但现有方法忽略基因生物功能语义。本文提出scLLM-DSC框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）的知识增强跨模态深度结构聚类，通过设计LLM与聚类模块的跨模态对齐，在多个基准数据集上取得更优的聚类结果，验证了LLM知识对生物数据聚类的有效性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 单细胞RNA测序分析中聚类是关键，但现有方法忽略基因生物功能语义。本文提出scLLM-DSC框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）的知识增强跨模态深度结构聚类，通过设计LLM与聚类模块的跨模态对齐，在多个基准数据集上取得更优的聚类结果，验证了LLM知识对生物数据聚类的有效性。
